summary: Phase 15 testing completed - All new features verified. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: All key features working correctly.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

Invoice column shows correct statuses: Not Required/Pending/Uploaded
Free sample formulation inputs working with data-testid fs-formulation-input-{index}
